§6Diesel§f

§aThe workhorse fuel of the early-mid game — efficient, versatile, and powering everything from generators to flamethrowers!§f

Diesel is a high-grade fuel produced by fractioning §bNaphtha§f or §bLight Oil§f. With §e550 kTU§f and §e1.37 MHE§f per bucket, it provides excellent energy density for combustion generators.

§6Production§f:
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (primary from Naphtha): §e100mB§f Naphtha → §e60mB§f Diesel + §e40mB§f Heating Oil.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (from Light Oil): §e100mB§f Light Oil → §e40mB§f Diesel + §e60mB§f Kerosene.
§b• Hydrotreater§f: Treat §e1,000mB§f Cracked Diesel + §e100mB§f Liquid Hydrogen → §e800mB§f Diesel + §e300mB§f Sour Gas (requires §e1 PU§f).

§6Uses§f:
§b• Diesel Generator§f: Burns Diesel at §e75%§f fuel efficiency (High fuel grade).
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f: Crack §e100mB§f Diesel → §e40mB§f Kerosene + §e30mB§f Petroleum Gas.
§b• Industrial Mixer§f: §e900mB§f Diesel + §e100mB§f Reformate → §e1,000mB§f High-Octane Diesel.
§b• Industrial Solidification§f: §e3,200mB§f Diesel → §e1×§f Solid Fuel.
§b• Coker Unit§f: §e590mB§f Diesel → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e59mB§f Coker Naphtha.

§eTip§f: Diesel is also a weapon fuel! Use it in the §bMister Topaz§f flamethrower (Diesel Tank provides §e100§f ammo) or the §bChainsaw§f (holds up to §e5,000mB§f). The §bDiesel-Powered Armor§f set consumes fuel only on damage taken — §e64,000mB§f per piece lasts a long time!
